overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a warrior character walking through a desert canyon at night. The scene features moonlit rocky terrain with sparse vegetation, canyon walls on both sides, and distant mountains visible under a starry sky.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the dirt path through the canyon

entered.detail: tall rocky canyon wall forming the left boundary of the path
rocky rubble and slope on the right side of the path
sandy dirt trail with tire tracks running through the canyon
dark blue night sky filled with visible stars
bright moon illuminating the scene from the upper right
mountain peaks visible in the far distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a desert canyon at night. Rocky canyon walls flank the path on both sides, with a prominent rocky slope on the right. The starry sky and moon provide illumination while distant mountains are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding desert canyon path opening to valley

events.description: path curves slightly to the left as the canyon opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing along the canyon path as it curves gently leftward

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the canyon path curves gently left, bringing the left canyon wall closer while the right rocky slope recedes into the distance. The view ahead opens toward the distant mountain range, with sparse desert vegetation visible along the trail edges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit desert canyon that gradually opens toward a distant mountain range. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail flanked by towering rocky walls and a prominent slope on the right under a starry sky. As the character progresses, the path curves gently to the left, bringing the left canyon wall closer while the right slope recedes into the distance. The scene then expands to reveal sparse desert vegetation along the trail edges before the view opens fully toward the far-off mountains.
